ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "account_length" INTEGER /* Length of the customer's account in months */,
  "vmail_message" INTEGER /* Number of voice mail messages */,
  "custserv_calls" INTEGER /* Number of customer service calls */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined the service */,
  "churn_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has churned */,
  "churn_reason" TEXT /* Reason for churn (if applicable) */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last customer service contact */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Customer's credit score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_details" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call detail entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "day_mins" REAL /* Total minutes of day calls */,
  "day_calls" INTEGER /* Number of day calls */,
  "eve_mins" REAL /* Total minutes of evening calls */,
  "eve_calls" INTEGER /* Number of evening calls */,
  "night_mins" REAL /* Total minutes of night calls */,
  "night_calls" INTEGER /* Number of night calls */,
  "intl_mins" REAL /* Total minutes of international calls */,
  "intl_calls" INTEGER /* Number of international calls */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date of the call */,
  "call_time" TEXT /* Time of the call */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the call in seconds */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call (e.g., voice, video) */,
  "call_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the call (e.g., incoming, outgoing) */,
  "international_country_code" TEXT /* Country code for international calls */,
  "call_cost" REAL /* Cost of the call */,
  "call_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the call (e.g., good, bad) */,
  "call_drop_reason" TEXT /* Reason for call drops (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_details_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the service plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of the service plan (e.g., International, Voice Mail) */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plan */,
  "plan_features" TEXT /* List of plan features */,
  "plan_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan became effective */,
  "plan_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan expires */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the plan (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_plans" (
  "customer_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer's subscription */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service plan */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer subscribed to the plan */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's plan (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "plan_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan became effective for the customer */,
  "plan_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan expires for the customer */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the plan renewal (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_plans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_plans_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES service_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code associated with the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_states" (
  "customer_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer's state association */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "move_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer moved to the state */,
  "previous_state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous state (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_states_previous_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_states_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_states_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_codes" (
  "area_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area code */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state with the area code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City associated with the area code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area code */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the area code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_codes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan feature */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service plan */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the feature */,
  "feature_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature became effective */,
  "feature_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature expires */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Status of the feature (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_features_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES service_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan's pricing */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service plan */,
  "monthly_fee" REAL /* Monthly fee for the plan */,
  "additional_charges" REAL /* Any additional charges */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the pricing became effective */,
  "price_increase_percentage" REAL /* Percentage increase in price */,
  "price_increase_date" TEXT /* Date of the price increase */,
  "price_effective_region" TEXT /* Region where the price is effective */,
  "price_effective_state" TEXT /* State where the price is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_pricing_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES service_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage statistic */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "total_mins" REAL /* Total minutes of calls */,
  "total_calls" INTEGER /* Total number of calls */,
  "average_call_length" REAL /* Average length of calls */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the usage statistics */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the usage statistics */,
  "peak_hours_usage" REAL /* Usage during peak hours */,
  "off_peak_hours_usage" REAL /* Usage during off-peak hours */,
  "international_usage" REAL /* International usage */,
  "domestic_usage" REAL /* Domestic usage */,
  "data_usage" REAL /* Data usage in MB */,
  "sms_count" INTEGER /* Number of SMS sent */,
  "mms_count" INTEGER /* Number of MMS sent */,
  "voice_usage" REAL /* Voice usage in minutes */,
  "video_usage" REAL /* Video usage in minutes */,
  "call_quality_score" REAL /* Average call quality score */,
  "customer_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Customer satisfaction score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
